About Me
The EngineerBehind the Code.

I'm Lavanya Kunche — a final-year CSE student at BVC Engineering College, Odalarevu, AP, graduating May 2026. A fresher who doesn't act like one.

Three real internships. Five live deployed projects. I've built production MERN systems, AI pipelines, ML monitoring dashboards and Tableau analytics — not classroom exercises.

"I come in already building, already shipping, already thinking about what's next — that's not typical for a fresher."

I care about the craft: the API at 80ms, the UI that feels alive, the model that understands context.

Full Stack MERNAI / LLM Apps Data AnalyticsML Ops Cloud DeployFast LearnerTeam Player
